title: Cjamango
actors: Ivan Rassimov, Mickey Hargitay, Hélène Chanel
plot: Just when Cjamango has won a bag of gold in a poker game, he is attacked by the gangs of El Tigre and Don Pablo. As he recovers from the injuries caused by the attack, Cjamango becomes attached to a Mexican boy, Manuel, and to a b...
